name: Orbius
short_description: Orbius is a suika-like, rogue-lite casual game where the goal is to get the highest score possible. As your score rises, you must select spells that make furthering the game more and more difficult. Will you master Orbius?
detailed_description: You start with the ability to drop 4 orbs of varying sizes. Anytime an orb touches another of the same orb, a newer, bigger orb is created, and your score is increased. But as your score increases, you must choose between multiple spells that make the game even more difficult. Spells that increase orb sizes, cause explosions, or force you to destroy existing orbs are what make this game feel different every new playthrough.
